MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOTELS PARTNERSHIP SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-01-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-08-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE GEORGE G. TYLER, RSHACKELFORD, REPORTER, ASAUSA, CLERK 2:50 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION. TERMS AND CONDITIONS STATED ON RECORD. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. AND AGAINST THE DEFT FOR POSSESSION OF SUBJECT PREMISES. WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT PHYSICAL EVICTION STAYED 5PM 11/8/94. EACH PARTY BEARS OWN COST. PLTF TO RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT AND WAIVE RENT/DAMAGES. IN RETURN DEFT TO WAIVE ANY CLAIMS AGAINST THE PLTF AND HIS ASSIGNS. DEFT AGREES THAT HE IS THE ONLY SOLE OCCUPANT OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES. IF DEFT FAILS TO MOVE OUT, DEFENDANT TO PAY PAST DUE RENT. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRICE, ROOSEVELT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 TURK STREET #554, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL NOV-08-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAIL.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PRICE, ROOSEVELT

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT PRICE, ROOSEVELT
